general.title: Vivo T5 Pro 5G Roundup: Launch Date, Expected Price in India and Specifications
general.summary: Vivo T5 Pro 5G is scheduled for launch in India on April 15. It features a 9,020mAh battery and a dual rear camera setup. This model will be the second in Vivo's T5 lineup, following the Vivo T5x 5G, which was introduced on March 17. The T5 Pro aims to enhance Vivo's presence in the 5G smartphone market.

general.title: 7 everyday devices that secretly run Linux
general.summary: Many everyday devices utilize the Linux operating system, which was first released by Linus Torvalds in 1991. Its open-source nature and robust design have led to widespread adoption across various technologies. Examples of such devices include smartphones, smart TVs, routers, and more, showcasing Linux's versatility and impact on modern computing, often operating unnoticed by users in daily life.

general.title: France says no to Microsoft Windows and the reason is America; says: We want to regain control of ...
general.summary: France is seeking to transition away from Microsoft Windows as part of a broader European initiative to lessen dependence on American technology. This decision reflects a desire to regain control over digital infrastructure and promote local alternatives. The move aligns with ongoing discussions in Europe regarding digital sovereignty and the need for greater autonomy in technology choices.
